back_translation: But as for you, teach the things that are consistent with sound teaching
Teach older men to be temperate, dignified-and-respectable, sound-minded, having soundness in faith, in love, and in perseverance
In the same way, teach older women to have a manner that is dignified, not to be slanderers, not to be enslaved to too much wine, but to be teachers of good things
So that they may train young women to love their husbands and to love their own children
To be sound-minded, pure, household-managers, kind-hearted, submissive to their own husbands, so that the word of God may not be discredited
In the same way, encourage young men to be sound-minded
In everything, show yourself to be an example of doing good. In your teaching, show integrity, dignity
and sound speech that cannot be faulted, so that the opposing side will be ashamed, because there is no evil thing they can say about us
Let slaves submit to their own masters in every matter, be pleasing, not contradicting
not stealing from the master, but demonstrating good faithfulness in every respect, so that they may make the teaching of God our Savior respected in every matter
For the grace of God has appeared, bringing salvation to all people
Training us, so that we may renounce ungodliness and worldly passions, and live sound-mindedly, righteously, and devoutly toward God in this present age
While we await the blessed hope and the appearing of the glory of Jesus Christ, our great God and Savior
He who gave Himself for us, to redeem us from all lawlessness, and to purify a people as His own — a people zealous for doing good
Teach these things, encourage, and rebuke with full authority. Let no one despise you
